column1: Warning:\n\n"Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards" contains some elements of plot which may not be  considered appropriate for some children.

column1: How old are you?
column2: 你多大？

column1: To verify you are really %v209, please answer five simple questions.
column2: 為了確認你確實是 %v209，請回答五個簡單問題。

column1:
Sorry.

This game can only be played by adults, or with an adult.

Please find an adult, come back, and try again.
column2:
抱歉。

這個遊戲只能由成年人或與成年人一起玩。

請找一個成年人，回來，再試一次。

column1: Oops. You blew that one!\n\nIf you miss another, you can't possibly be %v209.
column2: 哎呀。你搞砸了那個！\n\n如果你再錯一個，你不可能是 %v209。

column1:
You're a kid!!

Shame on you for trying to deceive a friendly game like this!

Please play again when you're older.
column2:
你是小孩！！

你真丟臉，竟然想騙一個友善的遊戲！

等你長大再玩吧。

column1: Correct.
column2: 正確。

column1: Thank you.\n\nAnd now, slip into your leisure suit and prepare to enter the "Land of the Lounge Lizards" with "Leisure Suit Larry!"
column2: 謝謝你。\n\n現在，穿上你的休閒西裝，準備和「休閒西裝賴瑞」一起進入「鬼混蜥蜴樂園」！

column1: Warning!\n\nThis game may be hazardous to those with heart conditions!
column2: 警告！\n\n這個遊戲對心臟不好的人可能很危險！

column1: No, you're not!
column2: 不，你不是！

column1: Question #%v208. Correct answer is %v211.
column2: 問題 #%v208。正確答案是 %v211。

column1: %v62 cycles in %v63 seconds
column2: %v62 個循環耗時 %v63 秒

column1: Hey! You're not alive yet.
column2: 嘿！你還沒出生呢。

column1: The Sierra adventure team races to your rescue, dumping your worthless, leisure suit- clad hulk into their giant bit bucket, for recycling into future games. Their underground workshop is humming with activity. This is "Where Adventurers Are Made, Not Born!"
column2: 山塞拉冒險隊趕來救你，把你那穿著休閒西裝的無用軀殼丟進他們的大回收桶，用來為未來的遊戲回收利用。他們的地下工作室嗡嗡作響。這是「冒險家的製造廠，不是出生地！」

column1: Commander Cavin quickly assembles a replacement Larry, while subordinates repair players damaged in other Sierra adventure games.
column2: 卡文司令迅速組裝了一個替代賴瑞，而下屬則修復了在其他山塞拉冒險遊戲中受損的玩家。

column1: With your new body and ego, you are returned to fight again the battles of Lost Wages!\n\n(Now you know what we have to go through every time you press that "Restart" key.)
column2: 用你的新身體和自尊心，你被送回去再次與失樂城的戰鬥！\n\n（現在你知道每次你按下「重新開始」鍵時我們要經歷什麼了。）

column1: Larry, when are you gonna learn to stay out of those dark alleys!!
column2: 賴瑞，你什麼時候才能學會不進那些黑暗小巷！！

column1: Hey guys!! He's screwed up again! Dump this one down the tubes, and get him another body!
column2: 「嘿，傢伙們！！他又搞砸了！把這個沖進下水道，給他換個身體！」

column1: Since you're dead, why are you talking?? Just hang on for the ride.
column2: 既然你已經死了，為什麼還在說話？？只管享受這趟旅程吧。

column1: It appears he wants something -- YOU! Get out of here!
column2: 看起來他想要什麼——你！滾出去！
